```{r higher_analysis, cache = F}
p_mean_exp3 <- two_parts_df_exp3 %>% 
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  mutate(
    num_chosen = case_when(
      response_position == "middle" ~ middle_number,
      response_position == "left" ~ left_number,
      response_position == "right" ~ right_number
    )
  ) %>%
  summarise(mean_num_chosen = mean(num_chosen)) %>%
  mutate(diff = mean_num_chosen - 3)

```


ppts in exp. 1, mean chosen number `r p_mean_exp1 %>% pull(mean_num_chosen) %>% mean() %>% printnum()`. t-test against 3, `r apa_print(t.test(p_mean_exp2$diff))$statistic`

ppts in exp. 2, mean chosen number `r p_mean_exp2 %>% pull(mean_num_chosen) %>% mean() %>% printnum()`. t-test against 3, `r apa_print(t.test(p_mean_exp2$diff))$statistic`

ppts in exp. 3, mean chosen number `r p_mean_exp3 %>% pull(mean_num_chosen) %>% mean() %>% printnum()`. t-test against 3, `r apa_print(t.test(p_mean_exp2$diff))$statistic`



given incorrect trials in part 2, P(higher_number) in trials where participant didnt chose only stones in part 1 and reconstructed incorrectly. estimated exp. 1 p(higher_number)  = `r plogis(round(fixef(model_exp1)[1], 2))` (β = `r printnum(round(fixef(model_exp1)[1], 2))`, 
SE = `r printnum(round(summary(model_exp1)$coefficients[1, "Std. Error"], 2))`, 
*z* = `r printnum(round(summary(model_exp1)$coefficients[1, "z value"], 2))`, 
*p* `r printp(summary(model_exp1)$coefficients[1, "Pr(>|z|)"])`)

In exp. 2 p(higher_number) = = `r plogis(round(fixef(model_exp2)[1], 2))` (β = `r printnum(round(fixef(model_exp2)[1], 2))`, 
SE = `r printnum(round(summary(model_exp2)$coefficients[1, "Std. Error"], 2))`, 
*z* = `r printnum(round(summary(model_exp2)$coefficients[1, "z value"], 2))`, 
*p* `r printp(summary(model_exp2)$coefficients[1, "Pr(>|z|)"])`)





```{r pstones_diff, cache=F}

exp1_pstones_diff <- two_parts_df_exp1 %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(
    pstone_p1 = mean(chose_onlystones),
    pstone_p2 = mean(chose_onlystones_p2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pstone_diff = pstone_p2 - pstone_p1
  )

t.test(exp1_pstones_diff$pstone_diff)


exp2_pstones_diff <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(
    pstone_p1 = mean(chose_onlystones),
    pstone_p2 = mean(chose_onlystones_p2)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    pstone_diff = pstone_p2 - pstone_p1
  )

t.test(exp2_pstones_diff$pstone_diff)




```


Exp. 1 within-subject t-test, pstones part 2 - pstones part 1 `r apa_print(t.test(exp1_pstones_diff$pstone_diff))$statistic`

Exp. 2 within-subject t-test, pstones part 2 - pstones part 1 `r apa_print(t.test(exp2_pstones_diff$pstone_diff))$statistic`



```{r estimate_means, fig.width = 8, fig.height = 3}

library(patchwork) 


exp2_chose_gems <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>% 
  summarise(pgem = mean(chose_gems))

exp2_estimate <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(pgem = first(number_correct_part1)/50)

exp2_chose_gems_p2 <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(pgem = mean(chose_gems_p2))

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtext) 


combined <- bind_rows(
  exp2_chose_gems %>% mutate(exp = "Part 1"),
  exp2_chose_gems_p2 %>% mutate(exp = "Part 2"),
  exp2_estimate %>% mutate(exp = "Part 1 Estimate")
) %>%
  mutate(exp = factor(exp, levels = c("Part 1", "Part 2", "Part 1 Estimate")))
  

summary_df <- combined %>%
  group_by(exp) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_pgem = mean(pgem, na.rm = TRUE),
    se_pgem   = sd(pgem, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )



asterisk_df_pstones <- summary_df %>%
  mutate(
    label = "***",
    y = mean_pgem + se_pgem + 0.01
  )




exp2_estimate <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(pgem = first(number_correct_part1)/50)

exp2_chose_gems <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(pgem = mean(chose_gems, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

exp2_chose_gems_p2 <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(pgem = mean(chose_gems_p2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

p1_vs_estimate <- exp2_estimate %>%
  mutate(pgem_estimate = pgem) %>%
  select(subj_id, pgem_estimate) %>%
  inner_join(
    exp2_chose_gems,
    by = "subj_id"
  )

p2_vs_estimate <- exp2_estimate %>%
  mutate(pgem_estimate = pgem) %>%
  select(subj_id, pgem_estimate) %>%
  inner_join(
    exp2_chose_gems_p2,
    by = "subj_id"
  )

p1_vs_p2 <- exp2_chose_gems_p2 %>%
  mutate(pgem_p2 = pgem) %>%
  select(subj_id, pgem_p2) %>%
  inner_join(
    exp2_chose_gems,
    by = "subj_id"
  )

fmt_p <- function(p) {
  if (is.na(p)) return(NA_character_)
  if (p < 0.001) return("***")
  if (p < 0.01) return ("**")
  if (p < 0.05) return ("*")
  sprintf("p = %.2f", p)
}

p1_p2_ttest <- fmt_p(t.test(p1_vs_p2$pgem_p2, p1_vs_p2$pgem, paired = TRUE)$p.value)
p1_estimate <- fmt_p(t.test(p1_vs_estimate$pgem_estimate, p1_vs_estimate$pgem, paired = TRUE)$p.value)
p2_estimate <- fmt_p(t.test(p2_vs_estimate$pgem_estimate, p2_vs_estimate$pgem, paired = TRUE)$p.value)


x_p1       <- which(levels(summary_df$exp) == "Part 1")
x_p2       <- which(levels(summary_df$exp) == "Part 2")
x_estimate <- which(levels(summary_df$exp) == "Part 1 Estimate")


y_top <- max(summary_df$mean_pgem + summary_df$se_pgem, na.rm = TRUE)
pad   <- diff(range(c(0.35, 0.45))) * 0.06
y_p1_p2  <- 0.365   
y_p1_est <- 0.4375  
y_p2_est <- 0.355   

cap_height <- 0.005
line_w     <- 0.6
text_pad   <- 0.006
text_size  <- 5

seg_df_pgem <- tibble::tibble(
  x       = c(x_p1, x_p1,  x_p2),
  xend    = c(x_p2, x_estimate, x_estimate),
  y       = c(y_p1_p2, y_p1_est, y_p2_est),
  label   = c(p1_p2_ttest, p1_estimate, p2_estimate),
  cap_dir = c(1, -1, 1)
)
seg_up <- seg_df_pgem %>%
  dplyr::filter(cap_dir == 1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(yend = y + cap_height)

seg_down <- seg_df_pgem %>%
  dplyr::filter(cap_dir == -1) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(yend = y - cap_height)


text_df_pgem <- seg_df_pgem %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    x = (x + xend) / 2,
    y = ifelse(cap_dir == -1, y + text_pad, y - text_pad),
    fontface = ifelse(label %in% c("*", "**", "***"), "bold", "plain")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(x, y, label, fontface)

pgem_estimate <- ggplot(summary_df, aes(x = exp, y = mean_pgem)) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = mean_pgem - se_pgem,
        ymax = mean_pgem + se_pgem),
    width = 0.12,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "black", color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.33, 0.45),
    breaks = seq(0.1, 1.1, by = 0.1),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.08))
  ) +
  labs(x = "", y = "P(*gems*)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_markdown(size = 12, hjust = 0.5),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.title.y = element_markdown(size = 14),
        axis.title.x = element_markdown(size = 14),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12))


pgem_estimate <- pgem_estimate +
  geom_segment(
    data = seg_df_pgem,
    mapping = aes(x = x, xend = xend, y = y, yend = y),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    color = "black",
    linewidth = line_w,
    lineend = "butt"
  )

if (nrow(seg_up) > 0) {
  pgem_estimate <- pgem_estimate +
    geom_segment(
      data = seg_up,
      mapping = aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y, yend = yend),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = line_w
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      data = seg_up,
      mapping = aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = line_w
    )
}

if (nrow(seg_down) > 0) {
  pgem_estimate <- pgem_estimate +
    geom_segment(
      data = seg_down,
      mapping = aes(x = x, xend = x, y = y, yend = yend),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = line_w
    ) +
    geom_segment(
      data = seg_down,
      mapping = aes(x = xend, xend = xend, y = y, yend = yend),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      color = "black",
      linewidth = line_w
    )
}

pgem_estimate <- pgem_estimate +
  geom_text(
    data = text_df_pgem,
    mapping = aes(x = x, y = y, label = label, fontface = fontface),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = text_size,
    vjust = 0.5
  )


print(pgem_estimate)

ggsave(
  "pgem_estimate.png",
  pgem_estimate,
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  dpi = 300
)

```

Difference in means for part 1 p(gems) and part 2 p(gems): `r apa_print(t.test(p1_vs_p2$pgem_p2, p1_vs_p2$pgem, paired = TRUE))$statistic`

Difference in means for part 1 p(gems) and part 1 p(gems) estimate: `r apa_print(t.test(p1_vs_estimate$pgem_estimate, p1_vs_estimate$pgem, paired = TRUE))$statistic`

Difference in means for part 1 p(gems) estimate and part 2 p(gems): `r apa_print(t.test(p2_vs_estimate$pgem_estimate, p2_vs_estimate$pgem, paired = TRUE))$statistic`

```{r conf_analysis, cache=F}

correct_conf_summary <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial, is_consistent) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_conf_subj = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_conf = mean(mean_conf_subj),
    se_conf = sd(mean_conf_subj)/sqrt(n()),
    n = n()
  ) 

incorrect_conf_summary <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial, !is_consistent) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_conf_subj = mean(confidence, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_conf = mean(mean_conf_subj),
    se_conf = sd(mean_conf_subj)/sqrt(n()),
    n = n()
  ) 


gems_stones_conf <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial, chose_gems, !is_consistent)%>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_conf_subj = mean(confidence)) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_conf = mean(mean_conf_subj),
    se_conf = sd(mean_conf_subj)/sqrt(n()),
    n = n()
  )

stones_gems_conf <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>% 
  filter(!is_catch_trial, !chose_gems, chose_gems_p2) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_conf_subj = mean(confidence)) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_conf = mean(mean_conf_subj),
    se_conf = sd(mean_conf_subj)/sqrt(n()),
    n = n()
  )

stones_stones_conf <- two_parts_df_exp2 %>%
  filter(!is_catch_trial, !chose_gems, !chose_gems_p2, !is_consistent) %>%
  group_by(subj_id) %>%
  summarise(mean_conf_subj = mean(confidence)) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_conf = mean(mean_conf_subj),
    se_conf = sd(mean_conf_subj)/sqrt(n()),
    n = n()
  )



```

(all part 2 incorrect trials)
gems -> stones mean confidence `r printnum(gems_stones_conf$mean_conf)`, SE = `r printnum(gems_stones_conf$se_conf)`

stones -> gems mean confidence `r printnum(stones_gems_conf$mean_conf)`, SE = `r printnum(stones_gems_conf$se_conf)`

stones -> stones mean confidence `r printnum(stones_stones_conf$mean_conf)`, SE = `r printnum(stones_stones_conf$se_conf)`
